pages.title: Radio Codes
pages.content:
# Radio Codes

## STATUS CODES

- **10-4**: Acknowledged - Message received and understood.
- **10-6**: Busy - Crew member is occupied, stand by.
- **10-7**: Out of Service - Unit is going offline / leaving session.
- **10-8**: In Service - Unit is online and available for assignment.
- **10-9**: Repeat - Please repeat your last transmission.
- **10-20**: Location - State your current location. "What's your 10-20?"

## CONSTRUCTION-SPECIFIC CODES

- **10-51**: Site Active - Construction site is open and crew is on location.
- **10-52**: Road Closure - Road is closed to civilian traffic. Barriers deployed.
- **10-53**: Road Reopened - Closure has been lifted. Traffic may resume.
- **10-54**: Equipment En Route - Heavy machinery is moving to or from the job site.
- **10-55**: Hazard On Site - Danger present — all units use caution in the area.
- **10-56**: Site Secure - Job site is cleared and secured. Session complete.

## EMERGENCY CODES

- **10-33**: Emergency - Urgent situation — all units clear the channel immediately.
- **10-35**: Confidential Info - Sensitive information — switch to private channel.
- **Signal 0**: Out of Character - Crew member needs to break RP briefly. Notify supervisor.

pages.title: Ranks & Promotions
pages.content:
# Ranks & Promotions

## Rank Structure

| Tier | Name | Time | Requirements | Permissions |
|------|------|------|--------------|-------------|
| T5 | ⭐ CEO / Founder | — | Founder rank. Not earnable through promotions. | Full authority. All sessions. Final decisions. |
| T4 | 🔱 Director | — | Appointed by CEO only. Exceptional track record required. | Manage departments, approve promotions up to Foreman. |
| T3 | 🪖 Project Manager | 4 weeks | Must be Foreman for 4 weeks. Lead 3+ sessions. Approved by Director. | Host sessions, assign roles, manage all site workers. |
| T3 | 📋 Foreman | 3 weeks | Must be Sr. Worker for 3 weeks. Pass foreman evaluation. Zero active strikes. | Supervise workers, report incidents, assign tasks on site. |
| T2 | 🚛 Senior Worker | 2 weeks | Worker for 2 weeks. 10+ sessions attended. Consistent performance. | Access equipment operator role. Mentor trainees. |
| T2 | 🦺 Worker | 1 week | Complete onboarding. Pass uniform check. Attend 3+ sessions as Trainee. | Access all standard roles. Attend all sessions. |
| T1 | 🟢 Trainee | — | Application accepted. Starting rank for all new members. | Attend training sessions. Limited site roles. |

## Promotion Rules

### Nomination Window
Promotions are reviewed every Sunday at the Management Briefing. You must be nominated by a Foreman or above to be considered.

### No Self-Nomination
You cannot nominate yourself for promotion. Asking management for a promotion directly may disqualify you from that cycle.

### Strike Freeze
If you have an active strike on your record, you are ineligible for promotion until the strike expires or is cleared by management.

### Time-in-Rank
Minimum time-in-rank requirements (see table above) must be fully met. Exceptions can only be made by the CEO or Director.

### Attendance Requirement
You must have attended at least 60% of sessions during your current rank period to be eligible for promotion review.

### Conduct Standard
Promotions are based on attitude, leadership, teamwork, and quality RP — not just how long you've been in the group.

pages.title: Uniform Guide
pages.content:
# Uniform Guide

## Site Worker

- **Hard Hat**: Yellow safety helmet
- **Vest**: High-vis orange or yellow safety vest
- **Shirt**: Plain white or grey shirt underneath
- **Pants**: Blue jeans or work pants
- **Boots**: Steel-toed work boots
- **Badge**: Shadow Construction ID badge

## Equipment Operator

- **Hard Hat**: Yellow safety helmet
- **Vest**: High-vis orange or yellow safety vest
- **Shirt**: Plain white or grey shirt underneath
- **Pants**: Blue jeans or work pants
- **Boots**: Steel-toed work boots
- **Badge**: Shadow Construction ID badge
- **Gloves**: Work gloves for equipment operation

## Management

- **Hard Hat**: White safety helmet (management)
- **Vest**: High-vis orange or yellow safety vest
- **Shirt**: Plain white or grey shirt underneath
- **Pants**: Blue jeans or work pants
- **Boots**: Steel-toed work boots
- **Badge**: Shadow Construction ID badge
- **Clipboard**: For site documentation
